title: Move Items across Groups Failure
excerpt:
I am trying to move items between groups and I keep on getting this error below: 
  
What might be the issue?

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to move items between groups and I keep on getting this error below:

image1131×395 44.6 KB

What might be the issue?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you had issues before? I’m thinking it might be an error. Are you the board owner? It could be board permissions locking it down, but I think it’s more likely a glitch

posts.author: Mindflows_MK (MK Escabarte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Timothy, this is MK from Mindflows.
That error usually means there’s a mismatch between the item and the group you’re trying to move it to.

Here are a few quick things to check:

  • Make sure both groups have the same column types
  • Check if any automations or dependencies might be blocking the move
  • Try refreshing or logging out and back in

If it’s just one item causing the issue, the data in that item might be the problem.

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I was able to resolve the issue by refreshing the page and logging back into my Monday account.

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
